meta.title: Plan a Voyage · Trip Details | Dean on Deck
meta.description: Ready to sail? Share your sailing, cabin, and fare preferences and Dean on Deck will come back with a plan, pricing, and every Virgin Voyages perk you're owed — no booking fees, usually same-day.
meta.ogTitle: Chart your course — plan a Virgin Voyages trip with Dean on Deck
meta.ogDescription: Tell Dean who's sailing, where, and how you like to travel. Get back a plan, pricing, and perks — no booking fees.

content.heading: Chart *your course.*
content.lede: Tell me who's sailing, where you're dreaming of, and how you like to travel. I'll come back with a plan, pricing, and every perk you're owed — usually the same day.

cabins.desc: The most affordable way aboard — a smart, modern room without a window.
A comfy cabin with an ocean view and a window seat made for gazing.
The signature Virgin cabin — private balcony, rainshower, and the famous red hammock.
Tom Dixon–designed suites with a stocked bar, marble bathroom, and Richard's Rooftop access.

fares.desc: Lowest price, non-refundable. Basic Wi-Fi and dining reservations 15 days out — for confident planners.
Virgin's classic inclusive model. Date changes allowed, classic Wi-Fi, dining opens 45 days out.
Premium Wi-Fi for two devices, a $15 daily bar tab, and the earliest dining access at 60 days.
I'll walk you through the tiers and match one to how you actually travel.

gratuities.desc: Save $2 a night, cover every crew member up front, and step off with no surprises on the final bill.
Settle gratuities on the ship instead.

notes.text: No kids, no chaos — just poolside cocktails, late-night shows, and lie-ins that last as long as you like.
I recommend it in case the unforeseeable happens — ask me when we speak.
Same fare as booking direct, plus Sailor Loot and perks you'd otherwise miss.

aside.note: Prefer to talk it through first? Text or call and we'll chart it live.
